items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional business-specific endpoints.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of optional business-specific endpoints, but the evidence provided does not include any specific records or details about these endpoints. The linked use case mentions the need for these records, yet no concrete evidence of their existence or functionality is presented. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary information to confirm or deny the requirement is lacking.
